Figure 1:Feature driftafter Task Arithmetic (TA) merging andFeatCalcalibration in CLIP-ViT-B/32.
Panels (a,b) use Stanford Cars:FeatCalmoves features toward expert features, raises their mean cosine similarity from 0.60 to 0.84, and reduces mean L2 feature drift, with 46% less final-layer drift.
Panel (c) reports per-task accuracy in the 8-task setting.App.˜Bgives full 8-task feature views.
